requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency / Minimum Performance (PBE + Portaria INMETRO 389/2021)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效/最低性能要求（PBE + Portaria INMETRO 389/2021）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效/最低性能要求（PBE + Portaria INMETRO 389/2021）

summary.en: Brazil regulates LED lamp/luminaire energy performance primarily through the PBE (Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem) and the conformity assessment requirements of Portaria INMETRO 389/2021. Performance and energy parameters — including luminous efficacy (lm/W), luminous flux, colour rendering index, correlated colour temperature, power factor, and lifetime/maintenance — are tested as part of INMETRO certification using ABNT NBR IEC standards (e.g., ABNT NBR IEC 62612 for self-ballasted LED lamp performance and the applicable luminaire performance standards). Products that do not meet the minimum requirements set in the applicable INMETRO Portaria cannot obtain certification or registration and cannot be lawfully placed on the Brazilian market. Exact lm/W thresholds and parameters vary by product sub-category — verify the current Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 and its annexes/technical requirements for the specific product type.
summary.zh: 巴西主要通过 PBE（巴西标识计划）及 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 的合格评定要求管理 LED 灯/灯具能效。性能与能效参数——包括光效（lm/W）、光通量、显色指数、相关色温、功率因数及寿命/光通维持率——作为 INMETRO 认证的一部分，按 ABNT NBR IEC 标准检测（如自镇流 LED 灯性能用 ABNT NBR IEC 62612 及适用的灯具性能标准）。不满足适用 INMETRO Portaria 所设最低要求的产品无法取得认证或注册，不能合法投放巴西市场。确切的 lm/W 阈值及参数因产品子类别而异——请核查现行 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及其附件/技术要求中适用于具体产品类型的规定。
summary.zht: 巴西主要通過 PBE（巴西標識計劃）及 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 的合格評定要求管理 LED 燈/燈具能效。性能與能效參數——包括光效（lm/W）、光通量、顯色指數、相關色溫、功率因數及壽命/光通維持率——作為 INMETRO 認證的一部分，按 ABNT NBR IEC 標準檢測（如自鎮流 LED 燈性能用 ABNT NBR IEC 62612 及適用的燈具性能標準）。不滿足適用 INMETRO Portaria 所設最低要求的產品無法取得認證或注冊，不能合法投放巴西市場。確切的 lm/W 閾值及參數因產品子類別而異——請核查現行 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 及其附件/技術要求中適用於具體產品類型的規定。

standards_or_laws: Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 — Conformity assessment for LED lamps and luminaires (minimum performance requirements, Brazil)
PBE — Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem (Brazilian Labelling Programme, INMETRO)
ABNT NBR IEC 62612 — Self-ballasted LED lamps for general lighting services — Performance requirements (Brazilian adoption of IEC 62612)

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255-2019 (Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires). It defines three energy efficiency grades: Grade 1 (highest): ≥90 lm/W; Grade 2: ≥80 lm/W; Grade 3: ≥70 lm/W. Grade 3 is the minimum required for market entry in China. The China Energy Label (CEL) registration is mandatory for GB 30255-covered products; labels are administered by SAMR. GB 30255 does not comprehensively cover power factor, CRI minimums, or lifetime requirements in the same binding way as the Brazilian INMETRO performance requirements.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255-2019（LED 室内照明产品能效要求），规定三个能效等级：1 级（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 级：≥80 lm/W；3 级：≥70 lm/W。3 级为中国市场准入最低要求。中国能效标识（CEL）注册对 GB 30255 涵盖产品为强制要求，标识由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以与巴西 INMETRO 性能要求相同的约束性方式全面涵盖功率因数、最低显色指数或寿命要求。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255-2019（LED 室內照明產品能效要求），規定三個能效等級：1 級（最高）：≥90 lm/W；2 級：≥80 lm/W；3 級：≥70 lm/W。3 級為中國市場准入最低要求。中國能效標識（CEL）注冊對 GB 30255 涵蓋產品為強制要求，標識由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理。GB 30255 未以與巴西 INMETRO 性能要求相同的約束性方式全面涵蓋功率因數、最低顯色指數或壽命要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: Both Brazil and China impose mandatory minimum energy/performance requirements as a market-entry condition, but the schemes are non-mutual and the conformity routes differ. Brazil-specific gaps: (1) performance/energy parameters are verified through third-party INMETRO certification using ABNT NBR IEC standards (e.g., ABNT NBR IEC 62612), not through self-declaration or the Chinese CEL grade; (2) Chinese GB 30255 grade and CEL registration are not recognised by INMETRO — a product's CN grade does not determine its Brazilian classification; (3) lamps/luminaires must be rated and tested at the Brazilian 127 V / 220 V, 60 Hz supply, which affects measured power factor and efficacy; (4) the minimum thresholds, CRI, power factor and lifetime/maintenance criteria are set by the applicable Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 annexes and must be checked per product sub-category. Manufacturers meeting only CN minimums must re-verify against the Brazilian requirements before certification.
gap.zh: 巴西与中国均将强制最低能效/性能要求作为市场准入条件，但两套方案互不相认，合格评定路径不同。巴西特有差距：（1）性能/能效参数通过第三方 INMETRO 认证并按 ABNT NBR IEC 标准（如 ABNT NBR IEC 62612）核验，而非通过自我声明或中国 CEL 等级；（2）中国 GB 30255 等级及 CEL 注册不被 INMETRO 认可——产品的中国等级不能决定其巴西分类；（3）灯/灯具须按巴西 127 V / 220 V、60 Hz 供电标定及检测，这会影响实测功率因数与光效；（4）最低阈值、显色指数、功率因数及寿命/光通维持率准则由适用的 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 附件设定，须按产品子类别核查。仅满足中国最低要求的制造商须在认证前对照巴西要求重新核验。
gap.zht: 巴西與中國均將強制最低能效/性能要求作為市場准入條件，但兩套方案互不相認，合格評定路徑不同。巴西特有差距：（1）性能/能效參數通過第三方 INMETRO 認證並按 ABNT NBR IEC 標準（如 ABNT NBR IEC 62612）核驗，而非通過自我聲明或中國 CEL 等級；（2）中國 GB 30255 等級及 CEL 注冊不被 INMETRO 認可——產品的中國等級不能決定其巴西分類；（3）燈/燈具須按巴西 127 V / 220 V、60 Hz 供電標定及檢測，這會影響實測功率因數與光效；（4）最低閾值、顯色指數、功率因數及壽命/光通維持率準則由適用的 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 附件設定，須按產品子類別核查。僅滿足中國最低要求的製造商須在認證前對照巴西要求重新核驗。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — products not meeting the minimum performance/energy requirements of the applicable Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 cannot obtain INMETRO certification/registration or be placed on the Brazilian market
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum Grade 3) — GB 30255-2019 Grade 3 (≥70 lm/W) is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: INMETRO — Instituto Nacional de Metrologia, Qualidade e Tecnologia

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil sets mandatory minimum energy/performance requirements for LED lamps and luminaires via PBE and Portaria INMETRO 389/2021, verified through third-party INMETRO certification using ABNT NBR IEC standards. Chinese GB 30255 grades and CEL registration are not recognised by INMETRO, and the CN grade does not map to a Brazilian classification. Products must be tested at the 127/220 V, 60 Hz supply. Verify the exact thresholds (efficacy, CRI, power factor, lifetime) in the current Portaria for the specific product sub-category before certification.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西通过 PBE 及 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 为 LED 灯及灯具设定强制最低能效/性能要求，并通过第三方 INMETRO 认证按 ABNT NBR IEC 标准核验。中国 GB 30255 等级及 CEL 注册不被 INMETRO 认可，中国等级不能映射为巴西分类。产品须按 127/220 V、60 Hz 供电检测。认证前请在现行 Portaria 中核查具体产品子类别的确切阈值（光效、显色指数、功率因数、寿命）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西通過 PBE 及 Portaria INMETRO 389/2021 為 LED 燈及燈具設定強制最低能效/性能要求，並通過第三方 INMETRO 認證按 ABNT NBR IEC 標準核驗。中國 GB 30255 等級及 CEL 注冊不被 INMETRO 認可，中國等級不能映射為巴西分類。產品須按 127/220 V、60 Hz 供電檢測。認證前請在現行 Portaria 中核查具體產品子類別的確切閾值（光效、顯色指數、功率因數、壽命）。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Label + Selo PROCEL (PBE Energy Labelling, INMETRO + Eletrobras)
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签 + Selo PROCEL（PBE 能效标签，INMETRO + Eletrobras）
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤 + Selo PROCEL（PBE 能效標籤，INMETRO + Eletrobras）

summary.en: Brazil's energy labelling for LED lamps/luminaires is delivered through the PBE (Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem), which applies the ENCE (Etiqueta Nacional de Conservação de Energia) energy label, administered by INMETRO. The PBE energy class is determined from the product's measured energy/performance characteristics under the applicable ABNT NBR IEC test standards. The highest-performing products may additionally qualify for the Selo PROCEL — the PROCEL endorsement seal administered by Eletrobras (PROCEL programme) — which recognises the most energy-efficient products. The ENCE label and, where granted, the Selo PROCEL must appear on the product/packaging as required. The labelling obligation attaches to the in-scope product placed on the Brazilian market and is part of the INMETRO conformity assessment programme held by the CNPJ importer/representative.
summary.zh: 巴西 LED 灯/灯具的能效标签通过 PBE（巴西标识计划）实施，采用 ENCE（国家节能标签），由 INMETRO 管理。PBE 能效等级根据产品在适用 ABNT NBR IEC 检测标准下实测的能效/性能特性确定。性能最优的产品还可额外取得 Selo PROCEL——由 Eletrobras（PROCEL 计划）管理的 PROCEL 认可标识——以表彰最节能产品。ENCE 标签及（在获批时）Selo PROCEL 须按要求出现在产品/包装上。该标签义务附属于投放巴西市场的适用产品，并属于由 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 合格评定程序的一部分。
summary.zht: 巴西 LED 燈/燈具的能效標籤通過 PBE（巴西標識計劃）實施，採用 ENCE（國家節能標籤），由 INMETRO 管理。PBE 能效等級根據產品在適用 ABNT NBR IEC 檢測標準下實測的能效/性能特性確定。性能最優的產品還可額外取得 Selo PROCEL——由 Eletrobras（PROCEL 計劃）管理的 PROCEL 認可標識——以表彰最節能產品。ENCE 標籤及（在獲批時）Selo PROCEL 須按要求出現在產品/包裝上。該標籤義務附屬於投放巴西市場的適用產品，並屬於由 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 合格評定程序的一部分。

standards_or_laws: PBE — Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem / ENCE — Etiqueta Nacional de Conservação de Energia (INMETRO)
Selo PROCEL — PROCEL endorsement seal administered by Eletrobras (PROCEL programme)

summary.en: China's China Energy Label (CEL) under GB 30255-2019 is mandatory for LED room luminaires. Products must be registered with the CQC (China Quality Certification Centre) or CECP (China Energy Conservation Programme) before affixing the CEL. The CEL shows Grade 1–3 based on absolute lm/W thresholds. There is no mutual recognition between the Brazilian PBE/ENCE / Selo PROCEL labelling scheme and the CN CEL registration scheme.
summary.zh: 中国依据 GB 30255-2019 对 LED 室内照明产品实施强制性中国能效标识（CEL）。产品须在贴附中国能效标识前向中国质量认证中心（CQC）或中国节能产品认证（CECP）进行注册。CEL 依据绝对 lm/W 阈值显示 1–3 级。巴西 PBE/ENCE / Selo PROCEL 标签方案与中国能效标识注册方案之间不存在互认。
summary.zht: 中國依據 GB 30255-2019 對 LED 室內照明產品實施強制性中國能效標識（CEL）。產品須在貼附中國能效標識前向中國質量認證中心（CQC）或中國節能產品認證（CECP）進行注冊。CEL 依據絕對 lm/W 閾值顯示 1–3 級。巴西 PBE/ENCE / Selo PROCEL 標籤方案與中國能效標識注冊方案之間不存在互認。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255-2019 — Energy efficiency requirements for LED room luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR/CQC/CECP

gap.en: Both Brazil and China operate mandatory energy-label schemes, but they are non-mutual and structured differently. Brazil-specific gaps: (1) the Brazilian ENCE label class is determined within the PBE under INMETRO conformity assessment using ABNT NBR IEC test data — the Chinese CEL grade cannot be carried over and a separate Brazilian classification is required; (2) the Selo PROCEL is an additional voluntary endorsement administered by Eletrobras for top-performing products, with no CN equivalent; (3) the label must reflect performance measured at the Brazilian 127/220 V, 60 Hz supply; (4) the labelling and registration obligation is part of the INMETRO programme held by the in-country CNPJ importer/representative, who is responsible before INMETRO. A product registered and labelled for the Chinese market is not compliant for Brazil and must be separately tested, classified, and labelled under the PBE/ENCE scheme.
gap.zh: 巴西与中国均实施强制能效标签方案，但两者互不相认且结构不同。巴西特有差距：（1）巴西 ENCE 标签等级在 PBE 框架下经 INMETRO 合格评定、依据 ABNT NBR IEC 检测数据确定——中国 CEL 等级不可沿用，须另行进行巴西分类；（2）Selo PROCEL 为由 Eletrobras 管理、面向性能最优产品的额外自愿认可标识，无中国对应；（3）标签须反映在巴西 127/220 V、60 Hz 供电下实测的性能；（4）标签及注册义务属于由在地 CNPJ 进口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 程序的一部分，由其在 INMETRO 面前负责。为中国市场注册及贴标的产品在巴西不合规，须按 PBE/ENCE 方案另行检测、分类及贴标。
gap.zht: 巴西與中國均實施強制能效標籤方案，但兩者互不相認且結構不同。巴西特有差距：（1）巴西 ENCE 標籤等級在 PBE 框架下經 INMETRO 合格評定、依據 ABNT NBR IEC 檢測數據確定——中國 CEL 等級不可沿用，須另行進行巴西分類；（2）Selo PROCEL 為由 Eletrobras 管理、面向性能最優產品的額外自願認可標識，無中國對應；（3）標籤須反映在巴西 127/220 V、60 Hz 供電下實測的性能；（4）標籤及注冊義務屬於由在地 CNPJ 進口商/代表持有的 INMETRO 程序的一部分，由其在 INMETRO 面前負責。為中國市場注冊及貼標的產品在巴西不合規，須按 PBE/ENCE 方案另行檢測、分類及貼標。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory (PBE/ENCE label) — the ENCE energy label under the PBE is required for in-scope LED lamps/luminaires via the INMETRO conformity assessment programme; the Selo PROCEL (Eletrobras) is an additional voluntary endorsement for top-performing products
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration with CQC/CECP required before affixing CEL under GB 30255-2019

source.publisher: INMETRO — Programa Brasileiro de Etiquetagem (PBE) / Eletrobras PROCEL

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazil's PBE/ENCE energy label is required for in-scope LED lamps and luminaires through the INMETRO conformity assessment programme, with the Selo PROCEL (administered by Eletrobras) as an additional voluntary endorsement for top performers. The Chinese CEL grade and registration do not substitute for the Brazilian label, and the class must be derived from Brazilian test data at the 127/220 V, 60 Hz supply. The labelling/registration obligation sits with the CNPJ importer/representative within the INMETRO programme.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 巴西 PBE/ENCE 能效标签对适用 LED 灯及灯具通过 INMETRO 合格评定程序为强制要求，Selo PROCEL（由 Eletrobras 管理）为面向性能最优产品的额外自愿认可。中国 CEL 等级及注册不可替代巴西标签，等级须依据巴西在 127/220 V、60 Hz 供电下的检测数据得出。标签/注册义务由 INMETRO 程序内的 CNPJ 进口商/代表承担。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 巴西 PBE/ENCE 能效標籤對適用 LED 燈及燈具通過 INMETRO 合格評定程序為強制要求，Selo PROCEL（由 Eletrobras 管理）為面向性能最優產品的額外自願認可。中國 CEL 等級及注冊不可替代巴西標籤，等級須依據巴西在 127/220 V、60 Hz 供電下的檢測數據得出。標籤/注冊義務由 INMETRO 程序內的 CNPJ 進口商/代表承擔。
